intro: Notes on mathematics from first principles, AI safety research, and occasional random thoughts.

math-notes.title: Mathematics from First Principles
math-notes.description: A chapter-by-chapter reconstruction of mathematics — from integers and proof up through analysis, algebra, and beyond — written as a complete, self-contained formation program.

posts.title: Why This Blog (and What Posts Can Contain)
posts.description: A short hello: what this blog is for, and a demo of Markdown, LaTeX math, code, and images in posts.

posts.title: Integers, Divisibility, and the Logic of Proof
posts.description: Chapter 1 of my first-principles mathematics notes: quantifiers and proof methods, induction and well-ordering, the division algorithm, gcd and Bézout's identity, and the fundamental theorem of arithmetic.
